faq.title: F.A.Q.
faq.a1: Lingola Job is a language learning app designed for those who want to improve their professional language skills.
faq.a2: No. Lingola Job focuses on vocabulary and expressions used in business rather than everyday conversation.
faq.q3: Which professions is it suitable for?
faq.a3: It offers content for IT, marketing, finance, healthcare, HR and many other sectors.
faq.q4: What if I don't know my language level?
faq.a4: Your level is determined automatically with the in-app level assessment.
faq.a5: Yes. There is content suitable for everyone from A1 level.
faq.a6: Content is based on real business scenarios and professional usage examples.
faq.a7: No. In addition to words, sentence structures, dialogues and usage examples are also provided.
faq.q8: How much time should I spend daily?
faq.a8: 10–15 minutes of regular use per day is enough.
faq.q9: Can I really use what I learn in the workplace?
faq.a9: Yes. Content is tailored to meetings, emails and business communication.
faq.a10: The app can be used for free; premium options are available for advanced content.
